delete-all-annotations.title: Delete All Annotations from PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor
delete-all-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF to PdfAnnotationEditor, remove all annotations, and save the cleaned document.

delete-pdf-annotations.title: Delete All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
delete-pdf-annotations.description: Iterates through a specified folder, removes all annotations from each PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor, and overwrites the original files.

delete-text-annotations.title: Delete Text Annotations from PDF
delete-text-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to remove only text annotations from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor.

remove-link-annotations.title: Remove Link Annotations from Specific Pages
remove-link-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to delete link annotations on pages 3 through 7 using PdfAnnotationEditor.

delete-annotation-by-name.title: Delete Annotation by Name from PDF
delete-annotation-by-name.description: Demonstrates how to delete a single PDF annotation identified by its name using PdfAnnotationEditor.

delete-annotation-by-name__v2.title: Delete Annotation by Name using PdfAnnotationEditor
delete-annotation-by-name__v2.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific annotation from a PDF by its name using the PdfAnnotationEditor class.

export-pdf-annotations-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF File
export-pdf-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF document to an XFDF file using a stream.

export-annotations-xfdf.title: Export Annotations from Specific Pages to XFDF Stream
export-annotations-xfdf.description: Exports annotations from the first two pages of a PDF into an in‑memory XFDF stream using PdfAnnotationEditor.

export-highlight-annotations.title: Export Highlight Annotations to XFDF
export-highlight-annotations.description: Exports only highlight annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file using PdfAnnotationEditor.

import-annotations-xfdf.title: Import Annotations from XFDF into PDF
import-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to import all annotations from an XFDF file into an existing PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor.

import-xfdf-annotations.title: Import XFDF Annotations onto Specific Pages
import-xfdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates exporting annotations from a page range to XFDF and then importing them into another PDF.

import-annotations-no-overwrite.title: Import Annotations Without Overwriting Existing Ones
import-annotations-no-overwrite.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from other PDFs while preserving existing annotations by disabling the overwrite option.

flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Flatten All Annotations in a PDF
flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Loads a PDF, flattens all its annotations into non‑editable visual content, and saves the result.

flatten-annotations-first-five-pages.title: Flatten Annotations on First Five Pages
flatten-annotations-first-five-pages.description: Flattens all annotations on the first five pages of a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor with a page range argument.

modify-annotation-author.title: Modify Annotation Author on Specific Page
modify-annotation-author.description: Demonstrates how to change the author of annotations on page three using PdfAnnotationEditor.

modify-annotation-subject-color.title: Modify Annotation Subject and Color in PDF
modify-annotation-subject-color.description: Demonstrates how to change the subject and color of existing annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

set-annotations-open.title: Set All Annotations to Open in a PDF
set-annotations-open.description: Iterates through all pages and annotations in a PDF and sets the Open flag to true, then saves the modified document.

update-annotation-modified-date.title: Update Annotation Modified Date Using PdfAnnotationEditor
update-annotation-modified-date.description: Demonstrates how to set the Modified property of a PDF annotation to the current system time using PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

set-readonly-annotation.title: Set ReadOnly Flag on PDF Annotation
set-readonly-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to apply the ReadOnly flag to a specific annotation using PdfAnnotationEditor.

batch-update-annotation-author.title: Batch Update Annotation Author in PDFs
batch-update-annotation-author.description: Loops through PDF files in a folder and changes the author of all annotations from a specified source author to a new author using PdfAnnotationEditor.

export-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v2.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Using MemoryStream
export-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF from a byte array via MemoryStream, export its annotations to XFDF using Aspose.Pdf, and return the XFDF as a byte array.

import-xfdf-annotations__v2.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF from Streams
import-xfdf-annotations__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF and an XFDF file from streams and importing the XFDF annotations into the PDF without using temporary files.

delete-flatten-annotations.title: Delete and Flatten Annotations in PDF
delete-flatten-annotations.description: Deletes all annotations from a PDF, flattens any remaining ones, and saves the result.

validate-xfdf.title: Validate XFDF File Against Schema
validate-xfdf.description: Loads an exported XFDF file, validates it against the XFDF XSD schema, and reports any validation errors.

compare-annotation-counts.title: Compare Annotation Counts Before and After Deletion
compare-annotation-counts.description: Loads a PDF, reports the number of annotations, deletes all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, then reports the remaining count.

extract-annotation-details.title: Extract Annotation Details from PDF
extract-annotation-details.description: Loads a PDF, iterates all pages and annotations, and extracts each annotation's name, type, rectangle and page number into a custom C# object.

export-pdf-annotations-json.title: Export PDF Annotations to JSON Log
export-pdf-annotations-json.description: Extracts annotation properties from a PDF and writes them as a JSON file for auditing purposes.

delete-annotation-error-handling.title: Delete Annotation with Error Handling
delete-annotation-error-handling.description: Demonstrates how to delete an annotation by name and gracefully handle the case when the annotation does not exist.

delete-annotations-by-author.title: Delete PDF Annotations by Author
delete-annotations-by-author.description: Demonstrates how to remove annotations from a PDF whose author matches a specified name.

delete-annotations-by-color.title: Delete Annotations by Color in PDF
delete-annotations-by-color.description: Demonstrates how to remove only those annotations whose color matches a specific RGB value.

export-import-annotations-xfdf.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates exporting all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and then importing them into another PDF to duplicate the annotation layout.

flatten-pdf-annotations__v2.title: Flatten Annotations in PDFs in a Folder
flatten-pdf-annotations__v2.description: Processes all PDF files in a specified folder, flattens their annotations, and saves new files with a "_flattened" suffix.

batch-delete-stamp-annotations.title: Batch Delete Stamp Annotations from PDFs
batch-delete-stamp-annotations.description: Iterates over all PDF files in a folder and removes stamp annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor.

import-xfdf-into-multiple-pdfs.title: Import XFDF Comments into Multiple PDFs
import-xfdf-into-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates loading several PDF files, importing a shared XFDF comment file into each, and saving the annotated PDFs.

delete-annotations-parallel.title: Delete All Annotations from Multiple PDFs in Parallel
delete-annotations-parallel.description: Demonstrates how to use Parallel.ForEach with Aspose.Pdf to delete all annotations from a batch of PDF files concurrently.

measure-flatten-annotations.title: Measure Annotation Flattening Time on PDF
measure-flatten-annotations.description: Loads a 500‑page PDF, flattens all annotations while timing the operation, and saves the flattened result.

list-annotation-names.title: List Annotation Names in PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor
list-annotation-names.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, extract all annotations, and print their names to the console for debugging.

delete-annotations-unit-test.title: Unit Test for DeleteAnnotations Removes All Annotations
delete-annotations-unit-test.description: Creates a PDF with an annotation, deletes all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, and asserts the annotation count is zero.

delete-pdf-annotation-retry.title: Delete PDF Annotation with Retry
delete-pdf-annotation-retry.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific annotation from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor with a retry mechanism that rebinds the document if the first attempt fails.

delete-annotations-with-logging.title: Delete PDF Annotations with Logging
delete-annotations-with-logging.description: Iterates through all pages, logs each annotation's name, type, and page number, deletes the annotation, and saves the updated PDF.

delete-annotations-from-config.title: Delete Specified Annotation Types from PDF Using Config File
delete-annotations-from-config.description: Reads a list of annotation types from a configuration file and deletes those annotations from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor.

remove-all-annotations.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
remove-all-annotations.description: Removes every annotation from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

batch-delete-annotations-progress.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations with Progress Indicator
batch-delete-annotations-progress.description: Deletes all annotations from multiple PDF files while displaying a console progress percentage.

batch-annotation-flattening-cancel.title: Batch Annotation Flattening with Cancellation Support
batch-annotation-flattening-cancel.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor while allowing the operation to be cancelled via a CancellationToken.

get-annotation-names-by-author.title: Get Annotation Names by Author
get-annotation-names-by-author.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the names of all annotations in a PDF that were created by a specific author.

copy-annotations-template-to-multiple.title: Copy Annotations from Template PDF to Multiple PDFs
copy-annotations-template-to-multiple.description: Exports annotations from a template PDF to an in‑memory XFDF stream and imports them into several target PDFs.

validate-no-annotations-after-flattening.title: Validate No Annotations After Flattening PDF
validate-no-annotations-after-flattening.description: Flattens all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and verifies that the document contains no annotation objects.

batch-delete-annotations-report.title: Batch Delete Annotations and Report Count per PDF
batch-delete-annotations-report.description: Deletes all annotations from each PDF in a folder, saves cleaned PDFs, and prints the number of annotations removed per file.

pdf-annotation-helper.title: Reusable PDF Annotation Helper for Binding, Deleting, Flattening, and Saving
pdf-annotation-helper.description: Provides a helper class that encapsulates binding a PDF, deleting annotations (all, by name, or by type), flattening annotations, and saving the modified document.

remove-pdf-annotations.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF Stream
remove-pdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to accept a PDF stream, delete all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, and return the cleaned PDF as a stream.

async-delete-annotations.title: Asynchronously Delete All Annotations from PDF
async-delete-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to perform non‑blocking annotation operations by wrapping PdfAnnotationEditor calls in Task.Run.

delete-annotations-folder.title: Delete All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
delete-annotations-folder.description: Deletes all annotations from each PDF file in a specified folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

log-annotation-modification.title: Log and Update Annotation Modification Timestamps
log-annotation-modification.description: Loads a PDF, updates each annotation's Modified property with the current time, logs the change, and saves the document.

delete-annotations-with-backup.title: Delete All Annotations with Backup Copy
delete-annotations-with-backup.description: Creates a backup of the original PDF, then removes all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor.

delete-annotations-by-name.title: Delete PDF Annotations by Name
delete-annotations-by-name.description: Shows how to delete a PDF annotation by its name using a string literal and a variable.

benchmark-delete-annotations.title: Benchmark DeleteAnnotations vs DeleteAnnotation in Aspose.Pdf
benchmark-delete-annotations.description: Measures and compares the performance of deleting all annotations at once versus deleting a single annotation by name using Aspose.Pdf.

flatten-pdf-annotations__v3.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Log Size Reduction
flatten-pdf-annotations__v3.description: Loads a PDF, flattens all annotations, saves the result, and logs the original and reduced file sizes for audit purposes.

extract-annotation-rectangles.title: Extract Annotation Rectangles to Separate PDF Pages
extract-annotation-rectangles.description: Extracts all annotation rectangles from a PDF and creates a new PDF where each page visualizes one annotation's rectangle for inspection.

modify-annotation-flags.title: Modify PDF Annotation Flags with PdfAnnotationEditor
modify-annotation-flags.description: Demonstrates how to set custom annotation flags on existing annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

flatten-pdf-annotations-nightly.title: Flatten Annotations in PDFs on Network Share (Nightly Task)
flatten-pdf-annotations-nightly.description: Console application that creates a Windows scheduled task to run nightly and flatten all annotations in PDF files located on a network share.

flatten-annotations-verify.title: Flatten Annotations and Verify Removal
flatten-annotations-verify.description: Flattens all annotations in a PDF and scans each page to ensure no annotation objects remain.

export-annotations-pretty-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to Pretty‑Printed XFDF
export-annotations-pretty-xfdf.description: Exports all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and formats the XML with indentation for easy manual editing.

pdfannotation-editor-wrapper.title: PdfAnnotationEditor Wrapper for Simplified Annotation Operations
pdfannotation-editor-wrapper.description: Demonstrates a wrapper class around Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor that provides easy methods to delete, flatten, export, and save PDF annotations.

pdf-utility-cli.title: PDF Command-Line Utility for Delete, Flatten, Export
pdf-utility-cli.description: A simple CLI that can delete a page, flatten form fields, or export annotations to XFDF using Aspose.Pdf.

export-annotations-empty-pdf.title: Export Annotations to XFDF from Empty PDF
export-annotations-empty-pdf.description: Demonstrates exporting annotations to XFDF when the PDF has no annotations and verifies the generated XFDF contains a valid root element.

merge-xfdf-files.title: Merge Multiple XFDF Files and Import into PDF
merge-xfdf-files.description: Demonstrates merging several XFDF files into a single XFDF document and importing the combined field data into a PDF.

diagnostic-annotation-workflow.title: Diagnostic Annotation Workflow with Verbose Logging
diagnostic-annotation-workflow.description: Demonstrates adding annotations to a PDF while logging each step of the workflow to a verbose text file.

annotation-count-per-page.title: Get Annotation Count Per PDF Page
annotation-count-per-page.description: Loads a PDF document and reports the total number of annotations present on each page.

clone-modify-annotation.title: Clone and Modify PDF Annotation
clone-modify-annotation.description: Demonstrates cloning an existing annotation, changing its properties, and adding the clone back to the same page.

batch-import-xfdf-annotations.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations into Matching PDFs
batch-import-xfdf-annotations.description: Imports annotations from XFDF files into PDFs where the XFDF file name matches the PDF name, saving the annotated PDFs with a new filename.

concurrent-import-delete.title: Concurrent Import and Delete Operations on PDF
concurrent-import-delete.description: Demonstrates running page deletion and page import (merge) on the same PDF concurrently using tasks to test thread safety.

backup-before-flattening.title: Backup PDF before Flattening to Prevent Data Loss
backup-before-flattening.description: Shows how to automatically back up a PDF file before flattening its form fields and annotations, ensuring the original document remains intact.

count-pdf-annotation-types.title: Count PDF Annotation Types
count-pdf-annotation-types.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all annotations, and returns a dictionary with the occurrence count for each annotation type.

skip-flatten-readonly-annotations.title: Skip Flattening Read‑Only Annotations During Batch Processing
skip-flatten-readonly-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF except those marked as read‑only by iterating pages and applying Annotation.Flatten() conditionally.

annotation-performance-logger.title: Log Annotation Operation Durations in PDF
annotation-performance-logger.description: Demonstrates how to measure and log the time taken for adding and deleting annotations on each page of a PDF.

delete-annotations-export-xfdf.title: Delete Specific Annotations and Export Remaining to XFDF
delete-annotations-export-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete annotations of a given type from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then export the remaining annotations to an XFDF file.

retry-annotation-modification.title: Retry Annotation Modification with Exponential Backoff
retry-annotation-modification.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor with a retry policy that applies exponential backoff for transient file access errors.

list-annotations-csv.title: List Annotation Names and Page Numbers to CSV
list-annotations-csv.description: Extracts all annotation names from a PDF along with their page numbers and writes them to a CSV file.

remove-old-annotations.title: Remove Old Annotations from PDF
remove-old-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to delete annotations older than a specified number of days from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

check-duplicate-annotation-names.title: Check for Duplicate Annotation Names in PDF
check-duplicate-annotation-names.description: Opens a PDF, scans all annotations, and reports any annotation names that appear more than once.

extract-annotation-summary.title: Extract PDF Annotation Comments to Summary Document
extract-annotation-summary.description: Extracts all annotation comments from a PDF and compiles them into a new summary PDF.

preserve-annotation-appearance.title: Preserve Annotation Appearance While Removing Interactivity
preserve-annotation-appearance.description: Shows how to flatten PDF annotations into static graphics to keep their visual appearance before deleting their interactive properties.

merge-annotations.title: Merge Annotations from Multiple PDFs
merge-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to combine annotation layers from several PDF files into a single PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor.

pdfannotationeditor-health-check.title: Health Check for PdfAnnotationEditor Binding
pdfannotationeditor-health-check.description: Creates a simple PDF, saves it, and verifies that PdfAnnotationEditor can bind to the file without throwing any errors.

export-delete-archive-annotations.title: Export Annotations to XFDF, Delete Them, and Archive
export-delete-archive-annotations.description: Exports all annotations from each PDF to an XFDF file, removes the annotations from the PDF, saves the cleaned PDF, and archives all XFDF files into a zip archive.

flatten-pdf-custom-output.title: Flatten PDF and Save to Custom Output Directory
flatten-pdf-custom-output.description: Flattens a PDF (removes form fields) and saves the result into a specified output directory while complying with Aspose.Pdf usage rules.

flatten-annotations-log-sizes.title: Flatten Annotations and Log File Sizes
flatten-annotations-log-sizes.description: Flattens all annotations in a PDF and logs the original and resulting file sizes for audit purposes.

modifyannotations-subject-test.title: Unit Test for ModifyAnnotations Subject Update
modifyannotations-subject-test.description: Demonstrates a unit test that creates a PDF with a text annotation, uses PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations to change its Subject, and verifies the update.

batch-delete-annotations-retain.title: Batch Delete Annotations While Retaining Specified Types
batch-delete-annotations-retain.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON configuration that lists annotation types to keep, then delete all other annotations from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor.

flatten-pdf-annotations__v4.title: Flatten PDF Annotations from Stream
flatten-pdf-annotations__v4.description: Flattens all annotations in a PDF provided as a stream and returns the modified PDF as a new stream.

flatten-pdf-add-metadata.title: Flatten PDF and Add Flatten Date Metadata
flatten-pdf-add-metadata.description: Flattens all form fields and annotations in a PDF and records the flattening date as custom metadata.

export-annotations-xfdf-log.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Log After Export
export-annotations-xfdf-log.description: Loads a PDF, saves it, and then writes all annotation data to an XFDF log file for diagnostic purposes.

clone-annotation-change-color.title: Clone Annotation, Change Color, and Add to Another Page
clone-annotation-change-color.description: Loads a PDF, clones an existing annotation, changes its color, and adds the cloned annotation to a different page.

batch-process-azure-pdf.title: Batch Process PDFs from Azure Blob Storage using PdfAnnotationEditor
batch-process-azure-pdf.description: Streams each PDF blob from Azure Blob Storage into Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, processes it, and uploads the result back.

annotation-summary-report.title: Generate Annotation Type Summary Report for PDFs
annotation-summary-report.description: Scans one or more PDF files, counts each annotation type present, and prints a summary to the console.

safeguard-flattening-signatures.title: Safeguard Flattening When PDF Has Digital Signatures
safeguard-flattening-signatures.description: Loads a PDF, checks for digital signatures, and only flattens the document if no signatures are present, preserving signature validity.

rename-annotation-names.title: Rename PDF Annotation Names with Standard Prefix
rename-annotation-names.description: Loads a PDF, prefixes each annotation's name with a standard string, and saves the modified document.

add-annotation-verbose-logging.title: Add Annotation with Verbose Logging
add-annotation-verbose-logging.description: Demonstrates how to enable verbose logging for annotation operations via a command‑line flag and add a text annotation to a PDF.

export-annotations-unbound-test.title: ExportAnnotations throws exception on unbound PdfAnnotationEditor
export-annotations-unbound-test.description: Demonstrates that calling ExportAnnotationsToXfdf on a PdfAnnotationEditor that hasn't been bound to a PDF throws an exception.

extract-annotation-authors.title: Extract and Group PDF Annotations by Author
extract-annotation-authors.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all annotations, groups them by their author and prints a summary report.

export-annotations-xfdf-custom-namespace.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Custom Namespace
export-annotations-xfdf-custom-namespace.description: Exports annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and replaces the default namespace with a custom one to meet enterprise XML standards.

folder-monitor-flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Folder Monitor to Flatten PDF Annotations
folder-monitor-flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Monitors a folder for new PDF files and automatically flattens all their annotations.

validate-pdf-integrity.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Annotation Modification
validate-pdf-integrity.description: Loads a PDF, adds a text annotation, validates the document for corrupted objects, and saves the modified file.

export-annotations-xfdf-gzip.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Compress with GZip
export-annotations-xfdf-gzip.description: Exports all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and compresses the result using GZip for efficient storage.

import-xfdf-and-cleanup.title: Import XFDF Annotations and Delete Temporary File
import-xfdf-and-cleanup.description: Demonstrates importing annotations from an XFDF file into a PDF and deleting the temporary XFDF file after a successful import.
